attributes.action: Insist that questions asked to the Prime Minister are answered properly.
attributes.additional_details:
I am totally fed up of the PM never answering questions put to him by other parties MPs. He should not be allowed to do this, it’s rude it’s not helpfyand it makes people’s blood boil. Seems the only time he says anything is when his own party congratulate him on something that has nothing to do with a question.
It’s wrong and he should be held to task by the speaker and not allowed to continue until he has answered the question asked.
attributes.background: when questions are asked to the PM during PMQshe should answer them and not deflect or go off on a tangent about something not relevant to the question that has been asked. Also if the PM makes a statement regarding another party MP they should automatically have a right of response.

rejection.details: We can't accept your petition because the UK Government and Parliament as a whole aren't responsible for the issue you raise. Order in the Commons is the responsibility of the Speaker personally, and the Prime Minister is responsible for answers to questions.
